_comment: Market holiday table for scripts/calendar_rules.py. Keys are calendar groups: US (NYSE/Nasdaq/CME) and UK (LSE); dates are YYYY-MM-DD full-day market CLOSURES in the venue's local calendar (observed dates, i.e. weekend holidays roll to the substitute weekday). Covers 2026 + 2027 including floating holidays (MLK, Presidents, Good Friday, Memorial, Labor, Thanksgiving; UK Easter Monday + bank holidays). Half-days (e.g. US day-after-Thanksgiving, Christmas Eve early close; UK Dec 24/31) are NOT listed — those sessions still open. Re-verify against the official NYSE/LSE calendars before each new year and append the next year. calendar_rules.holiday_coverage() warns if the run year is uncovered.
